creator: liukang@cn.freebsd.org
text:
I think we should also change the vuxml database
--- vuln.xml.orig       Sun Dec 24 20:18:06 2006
+++ vuln.xml    Sun Dec 24 20:20:04 2006
@@ -1890,6 +1890,7 @@
       <package>
        <name>phpbb</name>
        <name>zh-phpbb-tw</name>
+       <range><lt>2.0.21</lt></range>
        <range><ge>0</ge></range>
       </package>
     </affects>
